title: A Family's Musical Journey
article_text: My dad used to be a native musician, but he had to retire because of a debt. He felt a great sense of relief when he could finally recover his health. I was a tiny child then, and I did not understand the outcome of his decision. My mother would blame him for the loss of employment, but he always had a careful explanation. I remember watching him stretch his fingers on the piano keys every morning. He would declare that music was his true honor. I began to analyze his songs to understand his feelings. One day, a witness told me that my father was a famous musical star in his youth. The fuel for his passion was the fruit of his hard work. Now I am learning to play the piano, and I hope to honor his dream with a suitable performance.

sentences.en: My dad used to be a native musician, but he had to retire because of a debt.
sentences.zh: 我爸爸曾经是一位本地音乐家，但他因为债务不得不退休。
